title: cleistes lenheirensis
intro: Cleistes lenheirensis, also known as the Brazilian orchid or yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to Brazil. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cleistes lenheirensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Cleistes lenheirensis are typically made from its roots and flowers, and can be consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
